features: 🍓 Kid-Loved Strawberry Flavour: Fun strawberry-flavoured splash toothpaste makes brushing enjoyable for children ages 3-8. No artificial sweeteners—just a tasty, kid-approved flavour that promotes healthy oral care habits.

🦷 Mild Fluoride Formula for Stronger Teeth: Expert protection with gentle fluoride to strengthen little teeth, protect enamel, and help prevent cavities—perfect for toddlers and young kids' sensitive mouths.
✨ Gentle Plaque & Stain Removal: Helps remove daily plaque buildup, supports fresh breath, and gently whitens teeth without harsh abrasives. Safe for children’s developing gums and dental health.
📦 Great Value 4-Tube Multipack: Bundle includes four 50ml tubes—ideal for home, travel, or siblings. A cost-effective way to keep your child’s teeth clean and protected every day.
🚫 Safe for Sensitive Little Teeth: Mild, non-irritating formula designed for kids’ delicate enamel and gums. Free from artificial additives, making it a trusted choice for parents.
description: Product description 🍓 Delicious Strawberry Flavour Kids Adore! Make brushing fun with our Splash Kids Toothpaste in a tasty strawberry flavour that children love! Specially designed for ages 3-8 years , this flavoured toothpaste encourages healthy brushing habits while providing expert fluoride protection for growing smiles. 🦷 Gentle Yet Effective Dental Care Our mild fluoride formula (1000 ppm) is perfect for children's sensitive teeth and gums , offering: ✔ Strengthens enamel & protects little teeth from cavities ✔ Gentle stain removal for whiter, brighter teeth ✔ Daily plaque removal to maintain healthy gums ✔ Fresh breath with a kid-approved flavour ✔ Safe for toddlers and young children 🌟 Safe & Trusted Formula No artificial sweeteners - naturally sweetened with stevia Free from harsh chemicals - gentle on dental enamel Dentist-recommended fluoride level for optimal protection Perfect for sensitive mouths 📦 Great Value 4-Pack Bundle Each order includes: ✔ Four 50ml tubes of strawberry splash toothpaste ✔ Economical multipack - perfect for home & travel ✔ Child-friendly packaging that makes brushing fun 🔬 Advanced Formula Ingredients: Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Glycerin, PEG-6, Xanthan Gum, Carrageenan, Sodium Fluoride (0.221% w/w, 1000 ppm Fluoride), Alumina, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Aroma, Steviol Glycosides, CI 73360. Why Parents Choose Splash Kids Toothpaste: ✅ Fun strawberry flavour makes brushing enjoyable ✅ Protects against cavities while strengthening teeth ✅ Gentle enough for toddlers , effective for kids up to 8 years ✅ Whitens teeth & freshens breath naturally ✅ Best value with 4 tubes included Start your child's oral care routine the right way with Splash Kids Toothpaste – the perfect combination of protection, freshness, and fun for healthy, happy smiles! Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to the brush, brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, focusing on all surfaces of the teeth, and rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow., Keep out of reach of children., Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
